name: Obligation Tracker
description: Automated task accountability for coordinator agents. Tracks spawned subagent obligations, injects pending tasks into prompts, and detects delivery to close the loop.

coordinatorAgentIds.description: Agent IDs that act as coordinators (obligations are tracked for these agents)

deliveredTtlHours.description: Hours to keep delivered obligations before cleanup

timeoutGraceSec.description: Grace period (seconds) after runTimeout before marking obligation as TIMEOUT

injectPriority.description: Priority for before_prompt_build hook (higher = runs earlier)
